text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick breakfast, I head to work at 8:30. My job involves deskwork, so I make sure to take short breaks to stretch. I usually finish at 5 p.m. and then go for a 30-minute run in the park. Exercise helps me stay energetic and focused. In the evening, I enjoy cooking dinner, reading a book, or watching a TV series. I try to go to bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me feel consistent and balanced every day.
